faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Howard Beach homes?
faqs.answer: Howard Beach's location near Jamaica Bay creates higher humidity levels, and many homes have older plumbing systems where organic matter accumulates in drains. These conditions are ideal for drain fly breeding. Our treatment addresses both the larvae in drains and the adult flies to break the reproduction cycle completely.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Howard Beach properties take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your home or business and the number of affected drains. We inspect all potential breeding sites, apply bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic buildup, and may use additional methods like foaming agents for severe infestations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment price?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate price includes a complete property inspection, identification of all breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning when needed, adult fly elimination, and a follow-up visit if necessary. We also provide prevention tips specific to your Howard Beach property to avoid future infestations.
